race.description: Vodka Cruiser Cup Provincial Maiden Handicap
race.comment: RIGA (8) two runs back had been sound before dislodging the rider at the start as a dominant fav over 1200m at Gosford on March 14. Can overcome the sticky barrier with Tim Clark aboard. Go close. STABILITY (2) three-year-old gelding by Zoustar from the good producing mare Calming Influence on debut for the Dilmi yard. Impressed in his last two trials and the blinkers and lugging-bit go on. Half-brother to Caballus and sure to be thereabouts. DEMMO DERMY (3) Yes Yes Yes gelding returning from a lengthy break. Failed to get into the contest on debut when sixth over 1200m at Newcastle last July. Wasn't pushed out in his two trials and can sprint well fresh from the low gate. ALL STAR (5) no match for the classy Barrengarry at latest with a plugging eighth over 1600m at Newcastle. That form has since been franked and well placed back to this trip.
